## Title: Fix ENCODE_U24 macro buffer overflow and size miscalculation

### Summary
The `ENCODE_U24` macro in the NAS TLV encoder was writing 4 bytes to the buffer while only incrementing the size counter by 3 bytes. This mismatch caused buffer overflows and type confusion when encoding 24-bit fields in NAS messages, particularly affecting mobile identity encoding paths like `encode_tmgi_mobile_identity()`. The macro cast the buffer to `uint32_t*` and used `htonl()`, which writes a full 32-bit w
